verdict: Silver's RSI at 29.5 after a -23.3% drawdown from the 30-day high signals mechanical oversold conditions, but the 4.37% US 10Y yield and restrictive Fed policy framework — the dominant macro scoring factor — continue to suppress opportunity-cost-sensitive demand. Watch for a break above $62.00 or a sustained decline in the US 10Y yield below 4.20% to indicate whether the Fed tightening narrative is beginning to soften.
